title: verbascum meinckeanum
intro: Verbascum meinckeanum, also known as Meinck's mullein or mullein, is a biennial plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant's leaves and flowers possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which are used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum meinckeanum include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to calm the nervous system and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
